name: Unknown Process Hash Observed
notes: This rule triggers when a process hash is not in the list of known process hashes.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when any of File Hash (custom) are contained in any of Profiled Process Hashes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Unknown Process Hash Observed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND NOT when any of File Hash (custom) are contained in any of Profiled Process Hashes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Detected An Unknown / Unseen Process (Based On The Process Hash)
Event description: Detects any new unknown process based on the process hash
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
